meta.title: DEF CON 31- Lions & Tigers and Fancy Bears, Oh My!  A Cautionary Tale - Jen Easterly, Scott Shapiro
meta.description: Fancy Bear, Dynamic Panda and Charming Kitten – we live in a time where we are constantly under attack without even knowing it. CISA Director Jen Easterly and Yale Law School Professor Scott Shapiro, author of “Fancy Bear Goes Phishing: The Dark History of the Information Age In Five Extraordinary Hacks” discuss how best to understand the challenge of information security; what we can learn from looking back; and how the decisions we make today to prioritize security by design will shape our future.
